commands.review_summary:
The PR revises Catalan app and website localization strings, adding missing app keys and improving terminology, grammar, and address form.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR is localization cleanup rather than a runtime bug report. The relevant verification is structural locale validation plus visible after-change UI proof.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; the PR is mergeable and has no concrete line-level blocker from this review.

target.title: fix(i18n): improve Catalan localization (app + website)
target.body:
## Summary

Comprehensive review and improvement of the Catalan (`ca`) localization across both the app (`ca.lproj/Localizable.strings`) and the website (`docs/site-locales.mjs`).

### App strings (`Sources/CodexBar/Resources/ca.lproj/Localizable.strings`)

- **Switch address form from 'tu' to 'vГіs'** following SoftcatalГ  guidelines, across imperatives, possessives, and verbal forms (e.g. `Desa` вҶ’ `Deseu`, `Vols` вҶ’ `Voleu`, `els teus` вҶ’ `els vostres`). Distinguishes descriptions (3rd person, untouched) from commands (imperatives, converted).
- **Add 142 missing translation keys**:
  - All notifications (`quota_warning_notification_*`, `session_depleted_notification_*`, `session_restored_notification_*`, `login_success_notification_*`)
  - All `Manual cleanup: *` headers and `Clearing removes *` bodies
  - All MiniMax services (`minimax_service_*`, `minimax_usage_amount_format`, `minimax_used_percent_format`)
  - Pace / run-out states (`On pace`, `Runs out in %@`, `Projected empty`, `Pace: %@`, `%d%% in deficit/reserve`)
  - Basic UI (`About CodexBar`, `Add Account...`, `Settings...`, `Quit`, `Switch Account...`, `Status Page`, `Usage Dashboard`, `Update ready, restart now?`)
  - Time formats (`Updated just now`, `today`, `just now`, `%dd`, `Last %d day`)
  - Provider errors (`Missing DeepSeek API key`, `No available fetch strategy for %@`, `OpenRouter API token not configured`, `z.ai API token not found`)
- **Fix typos and inconsistencies**:
  - `Clauers` вҶ’ `Clauer` (16 occurrences, wrong plural)
  - `0 %` вҶ’ `0%` (Catalan percent symbol has no space вҖ” current style was French)
  - `10 m` вҶ’ `10 min` (`m` means metres)
  - `magatzem` вҶ’ `emmagatzematge` (terminology unification)
  - `OK` вҶ’ `D'acord` in dialogs
  - `Гҡs utilitzat` вҶ’ `Гҡs consumit` (redundancy)
  - `Copia conserva` вҶ’ `l'opciГі Copia conserva` (grammar)
  - Token count mismatch in `minimax_usage_amount_format` (1 вҶ’ 2 tokens)

### Website strings (`docs/site-locales.mjs`)

- **Switch 'tu' вҶ’ 'vГіs'** (e.g. `combina-los` вҶ’ `combineu-los`)
- **Fix grammar/typos**:
  - `no s'emmagatzemen cap contrasenya` вҶ’ `no s'emmagatzema cap contrasenya` (singular agreement)
  - `restableixen els comptes enrere` вҶ’ `comptes enrere de reinici` (was nonsensical)
  - `Universal el GitHub Releases` вҶ’ `Universal a GitHub Releases`
  - `es basen en cada versiГі` вҶ’ `es publiquen a cada versiГі`
- **Align terminology with the app**: `Descarregar` вҶ’ `Baixa` (castilianism), `Keychain` вҶ’ `Clauer`, `Cookies` вҶ’ `Galetes`, `Token` вҶ’ `Testimoni`, `API key` вҶ’ `Clau d'API`, `Legacy API` вҶ’ `API antiga`, `enquesta d'estat` вҶ’ `sondeig d'estat` (`enquesta` means questionnaire), `widgets` вҶ’ `ginys`, `ConstruГҜt per` вҶ’ `Creat per`, `Guia d'autor` вҶ’ `Guia de creaciГі`.
- Use `programaciГі amb IA` instead of `codificaciГі d'IA` (more natural).

## Verification

```
$ node Scripts/check-site-locales.mjs
app/site locales OK: 21 locales, 50 site messages

$ node Scripts/check-app-locales.mjs
App locales OK: Checked 20 catalogs against 1051 English keys.
```

> Screenshots of the app running in Catalan will be added once the build completes.

## Notes

- The `ca` catalog now has **1051 keys matching the English source exactly** (0 missing, 0 extra).
- The address form was already mixed before this PR (mostly 'tu'); this PR makes it consistently 'vГіs' as recommended by SoftcatalГ . Post-review follow-up commits also fixed LanguageTool grammar issues (double prepositions, anglicisms, gerund periphrasis) and completed the vГіs conversion for sentence-level instructions. Button and menu labels (`InstalВ·la`, `Actualitza`, `Cerca`, `Afegeix`) are intentionally kept in singular imperative per SoftcatalГ  UI guidelines.
- A few strings remain hardcoded in English in `CodexBarCore` (`"Daily Routines"`, `"Estimated from local Claude logs at API ratesвҖҰ"`) because that module has no access to the localization function `L()` defined in `CodexBar`. This is a known architectural limitation tracked separately and out of scope for this PR.

## Files changed

- `Sources/CodexBar/Resources/ca.lproj/Localizable.strings` (+395 вҲ’251)
- `docs/site-locales.mjs` (+35 вҲ’35)
target.author: pmontp19
labels: status: рҹ‘Җ ready for maintainer look
